policyTitle: Agents Propose Strategy, Conveyor Projects Authority
purpose: Define the semantic strategy compile lane so AI workers propose strategy, the conveyor hardens it, and only bounded manifests authorize JSON artifact clusters.
law: Agents do not author JSON sprawl. Agents propose strategy. The conveyor hardens strategy. The strategy projects JSON authority. Receipts prove every file.
requires: strategy candidate is captured before promotion
strategy hardening receipt exists before promoted strategy authority
strategy artifact manifest lists every generated JSON and output path
target roots are declared before projection
SOG ownership remains separate from strategy authority
materialization and promotion receipts prove execution separately
forbids: strategy authority claiming durable product truth
provider candidate granting authority without hardening
artifact projection outside declared target roots
treating a strategy plan as resolver execution evidence
treating generated proof surfaces as durable behavior
completionPosture: Semantic strategy is a control object for governed expansion; behavior truth still belongs to SOG execution and promotion evidence.
